title: hapalochilus microrhombos
intro: Hapalochilus microrhombos, also known as the lesser rhombus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hapalochilus microrhombos include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and treat respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
